boxDescription: The fuse panel is located on the right-hand side of the center console, by the instrument panel. Remove the panel cover to access the fuse cover. Press the tabs on the top and bottom of the fuse cover to remove.

boxDescription: The power distribution box is located in the engine compartment. The power distribution box contains high current fuses that protect your vehicle’s main electrical systems from overloads.
